summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 16 features: Interactive Onboarding Tour, License Invites System, License Registration Page, Team Analytics exclusion, Settings Page with 5 tabs, Integration Test Buttons, and Email Templates. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Test 1: Login as master_admin (iam@ryansalvador.com / admin123) ✓
Test 2: GET /api/admin/license-invites returns list of invites ✓
Test 3: POST /api/admin/license-invites creates new invite with code ✓
Test 4: GET /api/auth/license-invite/:code validates invite ✓
Test 5: POST /api/admin/license-invites/:id/revoke revokes invite ✓
Test 6: POST /api/admin/license-invites/:id/renew renews invite ✓
Test 7: DELETE /api/admin/license-invites/:id deletes invite ✓
Test 8: Team Analytics excludes both extended AND honorary licensees ✓
Test 9: GET /api/settings/email-templates returns 7 default templates ✓
Test 10: POST /api/settings/test-emailit tests Emailit connection ✓
Test 11: POST /api/settings/test-cloudinary tests Cloudinary connection ✓
Test 12: POST /api/settings/test-heartbeat tests Heartbeat connection ✓
Test 13: GET /api/admin/licenses returns list of licenses ✓
Test 14: GET /api/settings/platform returns settings ✓
UI Test 1: Onboarding Tour - Next button works ✓
UI Test 2: Onboarding Tour - Previous button works ✓
UI Test 3: Onboarding Tour - Skip Tour works ✓
UI Test 4: Settings Page has 5 tabs (SEO & Meta, Branding, UI, Integrations, Emails) ✓
UI Test 5: Integrations tab has 3 Test Connection buttons (Emailit, Cloudinary, Heartbeat) ✓
UI Test 6: Emails tab shows 7 email templates with Edit buttons ✓
UI Test 7: Profile popover shows Licenses link for Master Admin ✓
UI Test 8: Licenses page shows License Management with stats and invites table ✓
UI Test 9: Generate License Invite dialog has all required fields ✓
UI Test 10: License Registration page validates invite and shows form ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Interactive Onboarding Tour correctly implements modal-based navigation with Next/Previous buttons
License Invites system fully functional with create, revoke, renew, delete operations
License Registration page correctly validates invite code and pre-fills invitee details
Team Analytics correctly excludes both Extended AND Honorary licensees from totals
Settings Page has all 5 tabs: SEO & Meta, Branding, UI, Integrations, Emails
Integration Test buttons work for Emailit, Cloudinary, and Heartbeat
Email Templates section shows 7 templates with Edit functionality
Sidebar profile popover shows Licenses link for Master Admin only
seed_data_creation: Created test license invites during testing (auto-deleted)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 16 features are fully implemented and tested: 1) Interactive Onboarding Tour with modal-based navigation (Next/Previous/Skip buttons work), 2) License Invites system with full CRUD operations (create, revoke, renew, delete), 3) License Registration page at /register/license/:code validates invite and shows registration form with pre-filled details, 4) Team Analytics excludes both Extended AND Honorary licensees from totals (verified via API), 5) Settings Page has 5 tabs (SEO & Meta, Branding, UI, Integrations, Emails), 6) Integration Test buttons for Emailit, Cloudinary, Heartbeat all functional, 7) Email Templates section shows 7 default templates, 8) Sidebar profile popover shows Licenses link for Master Admin only.

interactive_onboarding_tour.description: Modal-based tour with 8 steps, Next/Previous/Skip buttons all functional

license_invites_api.description: GET/POST /api/admin/license-invites, revoke, renew, delete all working

license_registration_page.description: /register/license/:code validates invite, shows license info, pre-fills form

team_analytics_exclusion.description: Both Extended AND Honorary licensees excluded from team totals

settings_page_5_tabs.description: 5 tabs: SEO & Meta, Branding, UI, Integrations, Emails

integration_test_buttons.description: Test Connection buttons for Emailit, Cloudinary, Heartbeat

email_templates.description: 7 default templates: Welcome, Forgot Password, Trade Notification, Missed Trade, License Invite, Admin Notification, Super Admin Notification

licenses_in_profile_popover.description: Licenses link visible in profile popover for Master Admin only

licenses_page.description: License Management page with stats, invites table, and Generate License Invite dialog
